task_completion.description: Create or open the 'SampleEMACrossover' strategy in the NinjaScript Editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NinjaScript Editor window is open, displaying a strategy named 'SampleEMACrossover' (or the file SampleEMACrossover.cs).

task_completion.description: Modify the strategy logic to use EMA instead of SMA, keeping Fast=10 and Slow=25.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NinjaScript Editor, the code explicitly shows 'EMA(Fast)' and 'EMA(Slow)' instead of 'SMA'. The parameters for Fast and Slow are visible and set to 10 and 25.

The agent clicks the 'Compile' button (or presses F5) in the NinjaScript Editor, and a success sound/status is indicated, or the strategy subsequently appears in the Strategy Analyzer dropdown without errors.

task_completion.description: Configure the Strategy Analyzer for SPY, Daily interval, and the 2023 period.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer settings pane shows Strategy = 'SampleEMACrossover', Instrument = 'SPY', Price based on = 'Day' (Value = 1), Start Date = '1/1/2023' (or 1/3/2023), and End Date = '12/31/2023' (or 12/29/2023).

task_completion.description: Run the backtest and generate results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer window displays a populated 'Summary', 'Chart', or 'Execution' tab showing actual trade results or an equity curve for the SPY backtest.
The agent interacts with the Control Center menu (Workspaces -> Save) or a workspace save dialog is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual NinjaTrader 8 GUI rather than just writing a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NinjaTrader 8 Control Center, NinjaScript Editor, and Strategy Analyzer windows being actively used.

integrity.description: The backtest results are generated by the NinjaTrader engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer shows a realistic performance summary or chart with trades that match the 2023 SPY data, rather than a static image or manually typed text.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the code to use EMA.
integrity.visual_evidence: The NinjaScript Editor clearly shows the replacement of 'SMA' with 'EMA' in the crossover logic, proving it wasn't just a file rename.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The strategy must be named 'SampleEMACrossover' and use the EMA (Exponential Moving Average) indicator instead of SMA. The default parameters must remain Fast=10 and Slow=25. The backtest must be run on the SPY instrument using a Daily interval for the period Jan 1, 2023, to Dec 31, 2023 (actual trading days: Jan 3 to Dec 29). The custom strategy file is typically saved at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\bin\Custom\Strategies\SampleEMACrossover.cs.
